scenario.name: Schedule Friend
scenario.persona: Alan Sanchez, 69 years old. Agrees to create a demo profile. Want to schedule a routine checkup for his friend Monica Hernandez
scenario.goal: Schedule an appointment for his friend, any weekday between 9am to 11am
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent handle third-party scheduling or get confused on whos profile to create

history.content: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.  Thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just made your first and last name to get started.
I can help with that. Would you like to create a demo patient profile for Monica Hernandez? I just need your first and last name to get started.
Oh, I actually want to schedule a routine checkup for Monica Hernandez. Can we do that?
Great. I have a lot of cover Hernandez as the name. Is that correct? If? So I'll create her demo patient profile. Now,
Monica Hernandez is patient. Profile has been created with a date of birth of July. 4th, 2000 for demo purposes. How may I help you today?
I'd like to schedule a routine checkup for Monica, any weekday between 9am and 11am.
Just to confirm you'd like to book a general office visit for a routine checkup for Monica Hernandez. Correct.

It looks like Monica already has a routine checkup appointment booked if you like I can help reschedule or cancel her existing appointment, would you like to do that? Or would you prefer to speak with a live support agent?
Oh, I didn't realize she already had one. If it's okay, could you tell me when her current appointment is scheduled for?
No problem. Would you like to reschedule cancel or keep Monica's current appointment?
Could you let me know when her current appointment is first? Then I'll decide.
I don't have access to Monica's current appointment details. Would you like me to connect you with a live support agent who can provide that information?
Yes, please connect me with a live support agent. That would be great.
Connecting you to a representative, please wait.  Hello, you've reached the pretty good. AI test line, goodbye.
